name: @llamaindex/liteparse-wasm
description: Fast, lightweight PDF parsing with spatial text extraction — WebAssembly build for browsers

scripts.build: wasm-pack build ../../crates/liteparse-wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../packages/wasm/pkg --out-name liteparse_wasm && node scripts/patch-wasi-imports.js
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build ../../crates/liteparse-wasm --release --target bundler --out-dir ../../packages/wasm/pkg --out-name liteparse_wasm && node scripts/patch-wasi-imports.js
scripts.build:nodejs: wasm-pack build ../../crates/liteparse-wasm --release --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/wasm/pkg --out-name liteparse_wasm && node scripts/patch-wasi-imports.js

author: LlamaIndex
